jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Emami - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Emami has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Emami:
Emami is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami!
